description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The facade is punctuated by a series of evenly spaced windows, providing a sense of symmetry and rhythm. The front yard is lined with a row of small, well-manicured trees, and there is a paved walkway leading up to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, giving the house a clean and contemporary appearance. The rear of the house includes a small patio area with outdoor furniture, suggesting a space for relaxation or social gatherings. The overall landscaping is simple, with greenery accentuating the geometric lines of the building.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a row of trees lining the front yard. The exterior is light-colored and features a small patio area in the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and a row of trees along the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of trees along the side yard and a glimpse of the rear patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, patio area with outdoor furniture, and the continuation of the tree line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, trees, and a clear view of the flat roof and patio.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a paved walkway, flanked by small trees, and a minimal overhang.
